{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Card Infobox|Neutralize||2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Weak|2}}
{{C|Neutralize||2}} is a 0 {{Icon|SE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Basic&color:Silent|Basic|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack&color:Silent|Attack|2}} Card for the {{KW|Silent||2}}.

== Obtaining Neutralize ==
The {{KW|Silent||2}} starts the game with one copy of {{C|Neutralize||2}} in her deck. It is not found in card rewards.

== Strategy ==
'''Neutralize''' is one of the {{KW|Silent||2}}'s basic attacks. Its free nature makes it easy to play alongside other cards during the first few fights, with the {{KW|Weak||2}} it applies letting it serve a defensive role alongside an offensive one.
=== Synergies === 
*{{R|Paper Krane||2}} increases the effectiveness of {{KW|Weak||2}}.
*{{C|Tracking||2}} doubles the damage Attacks deal to {{KW|Weak||2}} targets.
*Relics that trigger off playing a certain number of {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}} in a single turn, such as {{R|Kunai||2}} and {{R|Shuriken||2}}, benefit from Neutralize being a free attack.

== Notes ==
{{R|Archaic Tooth||2}}, if taken from {{KW|Orobas||2}}, transforms {{C|Neutralize||2}} into its {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} version {{C|Suppress||2}}.
*If '''Neutralize''' has already been {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}} and/or {{KW|Enchant|Enchanted|2}}, {{C|Suppress||2}} will be Upgraded and/or Enchanted by default.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Neutralize to the game.
